description: Shared pnpm preset for Caracal Lynx repos (DAG-144). Extend it AFTER the base preset so these settings win: "extends": ["local>caracal-lynx/.github:renovate-config", "local>caracal-lynx/.github:renovate-config-pnpm"]. Carries the pnpm-specific Renovate settings the npm-tuned base preset can't.

rangeStrategy 'update-lockfile': the base preset uses 'bump', which rewrites caret floors in package.json even for in-range updates. On pnpm workspaces that desyncs the importer specifier in pnpm-lock.yaml for non-root members, so CI's `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile` fails with ERR_PNPM_OUTDATED_LOCKFILE. 'update-lockfile' keeps package.json ranges fixed and only updates the lock file.

minimumReleaseAge '3 days': pnpm 11 enables a 1-day minimumReleaseAge by default and re-validates it on `pnpm install --frozen-lockfile`, so a PR raised the instant a release drops fails CI with ERR_PNPM_MINIMUM_RELEASE_AGE_VIOLATION until it ages out. Holding Renovate's own PRs for 3 days (> pnpm's 24h, with margin for CI timing) means a PR only opens once it can pass. Use minimumReleaseAgeExclude per-repo for urgent security patches.
